tagline: Pick a start and end date across one or two months, with quick presets.
whenToUse: Use for a bounded date interval — a booking, a report window, a stay. First pick sets the start, second sets the end (auto-swapped if earlier); presets like "Last 30 days" short-cut common ranges. For a single date use the Date Picker. onChange fires only when the pair is complete or cleared.
